untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Fibonacci retracement detection (23.6%-38.2% retracement depth measurement) and component confirmation tracking (51%+ of index components in same direction). These composite pattern-matching requirements and cross-component correlation analysis cannot be expressed using only the allowed atomic indicators and binary operators. Retracement depth calculation requires historical swing point identification and percentage measurement of prior trend move, which is not available as an atomic indicator.
